sr_workflow.description: Orchestrates Service Request (SR) lifecycles: software access, account creation, and hardware provisioning.

clarification_questions: What device category do you require (Laptop, Monitor, Mobile)?
Is this request for a new joiner or a device upgrade?
What is the delivery address or office location?
resolution_steps: Check stock availability in the hardware inventory database.
Initiate purchase approval workflow if stock is below threshold.
Configure standard corporate security image and MDM profile on the device.
Schedule courier dispatch and share tracking ID with the employee.

clarification_questions: What is the SR Name (e.g. Laptop Request for New Joinee, Surrender of Laptop)?
resolution_steps: Validate required fields based on the selected SR Name.
Request missing details from the user conversationally.
Place the service request inside Freshservice using the API.
Present the created ticket card.

clarification_questions: What is the SR Name (e.g. Bulk customer block/unblock for IBU, New user provisioning in MDG, Master Update – Non-Bulk)?
resolution_steps: Validate required fields based on the selected SR Name.
Request missing details from the user conversationally.
Place the service request inside Freshservice using the API.
Present the created ticket card.

clarification_questions: Which system do you need to unlock? (SAP MDG, SAP EWM, SAP PRD)
For whom to unlock? (Self, Common ID)
resolution_steps: Validate required fields based on the selected SR Name.
Request missing details from the user conversationally.
Place the service request inside Freshservice using the API.
Present the created ticket card.

clarification_questions: What is the SR Name (e.g. Password reset for SAP MDG (Self), Password reset for SAP EWM (Common ID))?
resolution_steps: Validate required fields based on the selected SR Name.
Request missing details from the user conversationally.
Place the service request inside Freshservice using the API.
Present the created ticket card.

incident_workflow.description: Orchestrates Incident lifecycles: hardware failures, system crashes, and printer/scanner issues.

clarification_questions: What device is having the issue (Laptop, Desktop, or Screen/Monitor)?
Could you please describe the specific symptom (e.g., system crash, hang, not booting, display flickering)?
What is the asset tag or serial number of the device, if available?
resolution_steps: Verify if the device is powering on or responsive.
Diagnose whether it is a software fault or a hardware breakdown.
Open an incident ticket in Freshservice under Category 'Hardware Issues' to dispatch IT Support.

clarification_questions: Is it a printer issue, scanner issue, or a configuration/paper jam problem?
What is the printer or scanner model/location?
What is the error code or message displayed on the device, if any?
resolution_steps: Check physical connectivity and print queue status.
Verify if a paper jam or hardware maintenance is required.
Open an incident ticket in Freshservice under Category 'Printer/Scanner' to dispatch local support.

clarification_questions: Which master data area is this related to (Common to all masters, Customer, Employee, Material, System Issues, Vendor)?
What is the specific code (Customer Code, Material Code, Vendor Code, or Employee Code) you are working with? (If not applicable, say NA)
Could you please describe the specific error or issue you are experiencing (e.g. data not reflecting in PRD, workflow error, block/unblock issue)?
What is the MDG Change Request (CR) ID, if available? (If not, say NA)
resolution_steps: Identify the master data category, subcategory and specific item error.
Check SAP MDG Change Request status from the backend if a CR ID is provided.
Route to the Master Data Governance support team under Category 'SAP MDG'.
